name: afianco
description: AFianco — Business Operating System per PMI italiane (monorepo root)

scripts.backend:dev: cd backend && set -a && source .env && set +a && ./venv/bin/uvicorn server:app --host 0.0.0.0 --port 8000 --reload
scripts.embed:sync-dev: mkdir -p frontend/public/embed/v1 && cp apps/embed-sdk/dist/afianco-embed.es.js frontend/public/embed/v1/ && cp apps/embed-sdk/dist/afianco-embed.umd.js frontend/public/embed/v1/ && echo 'Bundle synced to frontend/public/embed/v1/'
